name: FN57 | 电镀青铜
descriptionEn: Highly accurate and armor-piercing, the pricy Five-Seven is a slow-loader that compensates with a generous 20-round magazine and forgiving recoil. This memento from Siege has been painted with a gunmetal anodized effect paint over a chrome base coat. You don't know Felix Riley like I do... the man is impossible to break - The Traitor and The Truthseeker Part 1
descriptionZh: 拥有极高的精准度，能穿透护甲，价格昂贵的 FN57 换弹时间较慢，作为补偿，它具有设计巧妙的 20 发子弹和较低的后坐力。 这把来自围攻之势的纪念武器以铬为外表，通过青铜电镀处理进行了涂装。 你不了解费利克斯.莱利，就像我一样…… 那个男人是无法被摧毁的 -《叛徒和寻真者（上）》
